sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47445" key="h(pati/as" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡπᾰτ-ίας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n47445.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἡπατικός</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0627.tlg048:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">λοβοί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:215" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.215</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
